backend/main.mo: Defines actor with access control, user and driver types, role-based registration logic, and maps for drivers, travellers, and profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining light/dark theme variables and base styling rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component handling routing, authentication state, and dashboard selection.
frontend/src/components/BusMap.tsx: Canvas-based map component animating bus movement with road grid, trails, and interpolated positions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying branding and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with navigation, authentication controls, and user dropdown based on profile and identity state.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides identity state and login/logout handling using Internet Identity via a React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user, driver, and traveller data through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining base styles and design tokens for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin interface showing system stats, driver/traveller lists, and user deactivation controls.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver interface for managing bus number, location sharing, and simulated GPS updates.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Empty placeholder file for the Home page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity; after login it fetches user profile and redirects to the proper dashboard based on role and bus assignment.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page allowing admin, driver, or traveller signup and redirecting to the appropriate dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/TravellerDashboard.ts: Traveller dashboard that lets users enter a bus number and track its live location with auto‑refresh and map display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters with sessionStorage support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, animations, container settings, and enabling typography and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing app features, architecture notes, and pending feature requests for a bus tracking system.
